title: [circt-test] seq.firreg error with FormalContract in Chisel 7.0.0-RC4 and CIRCT
code_blocks:
<stdin>:7:12: error: 'seq.firreg' op using value defined outside the region
    %reg = seq.firreg %2 clock %clock reset sync %reset, %c0_i4 {firrtl.random_init_start = 0 : ui64} : i4
           ^
<stdin>:7:12: note: see current operation: %7 = "seq.firreg"(<<UNKNOWN SSA VALUE>>, %1, %0, %5) <{name = "reg"}> {firrtl.random_init_start = 0 : ui64} : (i4, !seq.clock, i1, i4) -> i4
<stdin>:10:10: note: required by region isolation constraints
    %3 = verif.contract %reg : i4 {
         ^
//> using repository "sonatype-s01:snapshots"
//> using scala "2.13.16"
//> using dep "org.chipsalliance::chisel:7.0.0-RC4"
//> using plugin "org.chipsalliance:::chisel-plugin:7.0.0-RC4"
//> using options "-unchecked" "-deprecation" "-language:reflectiveCalls" "-feature" "-Xcheckinit" "-Ywarn-dead-code" "-Ywarn-unused" "-Ymacro-annotations"


import chisel3._
import chisel3.util._
import chisel3.experimental.hierarchy._
import chisel3.test.UnitTest
import chisel3.ltl._

object testCounter extends UnitTest {
  Instantiate.definition(new Counter(10))
}

@instantiable
class Counter(MaxCount: Int) extends RawModule with Public{
  @public val width = log2Ceil(MaxCount)
  @public val in = IO(Input(UInt(width.W)))
  @public val out = IO(Output(UInt(width.W)))
  @public val enable = IO(Input(Bool()))
  @public val clock = IO(Input(Clock()))
  @public val reset = IO(Input(Bool()))
  
  withClockAndReset(clock, reset){
    val reg = RegInit(0.U(width.W))
    reg := Mux(enable, reg + 1.U, reg)  
    out := FormalContract(reg) { out =>
      EnsureProperty(out < MaxCount.U)
    }
  }  
}
